login.title: Access your app
login.emailCopy: We only need your email address to continue.
login.nameCopy: We couldn't find an account for {email}.
login.googleError: Could not sign in with Google. Please try again.
login.invalidOtp: Invalid code. Enter the OTP again.
login.loginError: Could not sign in. Please try again.
login.sendCodeError: Could not send the code. Please try again.
login.verifyCodeError: Could not verify the code. Please try again.

onboarding.travelDescription: From the itinerary to expenses, keep your whole trip in one place so you can focus on enjoying it.
onboarding.expensesDescription: Add expenses, split them however you want, and forget complex calculations, even while traveling across countries.
onboarding.goalsDescription: Create savings goals, track progress, and arrive ready for your next destination.

home.noRecentExpensesCopy: When you create an expense with friends, it will appear here.

quickSplit.title: New expense
quickSplit.entryTitle: Who do you want to register this expense with?
quickSplit.entryDescription: Choose one of your spaces or continue with friends you've already shared expenses with.
quickSplit.spacesEmpty: You don't have any spaces available to add expenses yet.
quickSplit.friendsListEmpty: We couldn't find friends you've shared spaces with yet.
quickSplit.friendsHint: Search registered friends to split this expense.
quickSplit.friendsEmpty: Add at least one friend to create this expense.
quickSplit.friendsSearchEmpty: We couldn't find matches for that search.
quickSplit.currencyPickerDescription: We'll use this currency for the amount and split.
quickSplit.validationDescription: Add a description for the expense.
quickSplit.validationSplit: Select at least two people to split the expense.

friendsExpenses.title: Friends
friendsExpenses.searchPlaceholder: Search by expense or friend name
friendsExpenses.loadError: Could not load expenses with friends.
friendsExpenses.empty: You do not have expenses with friends yet.

spaces.title: My spaces
spaces.noSpacesCopy: When you create a space it will appear here with balances and expenses.
spaces.pendingCopy: It will be created automatically once you are back online.

detail.deleteExpenseDescription: This expense will be removed from the space.
detail.deleteExpenseConfirm: You are about to delete {name} for {amount}.
detail.removeMemberDescription: You can only remove them if they have no pending balances.
detail.removeMemberConfirm: You are about to remove {name} from the space.

header.multiCurrencyHint: Each currency has its own expenses, debts, and balances

settle.title: Settle debt
settle.noDebtsTitle: There are no debts to settle
settle.noDebtsCopy: When there are balances between participants, you will be able to record them here.

reports.title: Reports
reports.balanceCopy: Amounts owed to you / by you, separated by person.
reports.noAccess: You do not have access to this space
reports.categoryMissing: We couldn't find this category for the current filter.
reports.categoryNoParticipants: There are no participants with expenses in this category.
reports.categoryNoExpensesCopy: Try another date range or review a different currency.
reports.selectDayDescription: Choose the date to filter the report.
reports.selectRangeDescription: Choose the start and end date to filter the report.

settings.title: Settings
settings.manageCategoriesCopy: Organize the space's expenses with consistent icons and colors.
settings.createNewCategoryCopy: Use a name, an icon, and a color
settings.emptyCategories: You don't have any categories yet.
settings.editorCopy: Set the name, icon, and color that expenses will use.
settings.moveExpensesCopy: This category has {count} expenses. Move those expenses to another category or leave them uncategorized before deleting it.
settings.moveExpensesDescription: Choose a destination category to empty this category.
settings.withoutCategoryCopy: Expenses will remain without an assigned category.
settings.noMovableCategories: There is no other available category. You can leave the expenses uncategorized.

goals.title: Goals
goals.notice: Under construction: this section may change or have errors
goals.emptyCopy: When you create a goal it will appear here with its progress and deadline.
goals.buildingCopy: We are improving this section. The experience may change and be unstable for now.

profile.title: My profile
profile.logoutCopy: Logging out will remove access to synced content on this device.
profile.disableNotificationsCopy: If you disable them, you will stop receiving expense, change, and space activity alerts in this app.
profile.installInstructionsCopy: Follow these steps to install Vornway as an app on your device.
profile.sessionsCopy: Manage the devices where you are signed in.
profile.noSessions: There are no open sessions right now.
profile.photoUpdateFailed: Could not update the profile photo

qrDialog.title: Scan QR
qrDialog.description: Point your camera at the space QR to open its invite.
qrDialog.browserOnly: The scanner is only available in the browser.
qrDialog.unsupported: Your browser does not support camera QR scanning.
qrDialog.invalidQr: Could not read a valid invite link from this QR.
qrDialog.readyCopy: If the space shared a QR with you, the app will open the invite automatically when it detects it.

converter.title: Currencies
converter.subtitle: Convert between currencies using updated reference rates.
converter.loadErrorCopy: Try again in a few seconds.
converter.sameCurrency: Same currency, no conversion is applied.
converter.missingRatePair: There is no registered rate for {from} -> {to}.

invite.title: Invite
invite.existingTitle: Are you already in this space?
invite.existingCopy: We found previously created participants that could be you.
invite.newParticipantCopy: There is no previous record for your account. You can create your access now.
